message:
feat(testing): add E2E test suites for runtime, HTTP, and gRPC (bd-1mgn, bd-21f9, bd-2l6g, bd-1phl, bd-2i3y)

- TestHarness framework with hierarchical phase tracking and JSON summaries
- 8 runtime lifecycle tests (nested regions, obligations, budgets, determinism)
- 7 cancellation stress tests (deep propagation, concurrent reasons, race drain)
- 31 full-stack HTTP tests (CRUD pipeline, codec, compression, pool, extractors)
- 22 gRPC tests (unary calls, interceptors, health checking, codec framing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
